---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the motivation behind the request.
_Example: I find it difficult to [...] because [...]_

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this feature to work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples that would help clarify the request.
